backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the RawFit Gym backend defining data types (members, diets, workouts, packages, attendance, videos) and in-memory state maps; includes membership lifecycle logic, attendance tracking, pause requests, and mixes in authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: fixing the member login flow (backend validation, error handling, useMemberAuth hook, App.tsx auth check) and adding loading/error diagnostic feedback to MemberLoginPage.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components, hooks, pages, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives and OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for both light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'RawFit Gym - Think Fit, Be Fit' and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router, React Query, and ThemeProvider; defines route guards (MemberDashboardGuard checks localStorage via useMemberAuth, AdminDashboardGuard checks Internet Identity) and auto-redirects authenticated users away from login pages.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied card with a logout button that clears Internet Identity and the React Query cache when the user lacks permission.
frontend/src/components/admin/Attendance: Admin tab for managing gym attendance, supporting member search, manual check-in/check-out, and displaying attendance history with method and status badges alongside a QR code generator.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardT: Admin dashboard overview showing stat cards for total members, diet charts, workout charts, and packages, plus pause-request notifications and quick-action guidance.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietFormDi: Dialog form for creating or editing a diet chart, allowing admins to add/remove meals with nutritional fields and submitting via create or update mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietsTab.t: Admin tab that lists all diet charts in a searchable card grid and opens DietFormDialog for creating or editing a selected diet chart.
frontend/src/components/admin/GymQRCodeG: Generates and displays a time-stamped QR code for gym attendance check-in/out, auto-refreshing every 30 minutes with a countdown badge and download option.
frontend/src/components/admin/MemberForm: A dialog form for creating or editing gym member profiles, supporting fields like package selection, diet/workout chart assignment, membership dates, and discount calculation (percentage or flat).
frontend/src/components/admin/MembersTab: Admin tab that lists all gym members in a searchable card grid, showing membership status badges and package info, with buttons to add or edit members via MemberFormDialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackageFor: A dialog form for creating or updating membership packages, capturing package type, duration in months, and price in INR with a live formatted price preview.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackagesTa: Admin tab that displays all membership packages in a searchable card grid with edit and delete actions, using PackageFormDialog for create/edit and an AlertDialog for delete confirmation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PauseReque: Admin notification card component that displays pending membership pause requests with approve/deny actions, including confirmation dialogs with optional admin messages.
Admin tab component showing all pause requests in two tables (pending and processed), with approve/deny dialog actions and status badges for each request.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoLibra: Admin tab for browsing and managing workout videos, featuring a searchable grid of video cards and a button to open the video upload dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoUploa: Dialog form for uploading a new workout video with title, category, description, and file fields, including upload progress tracking via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutFor: Dialog form for creating or editing a workout chart, supporting dynamic addition and removal of exercises with sets, reps, and instructions fields.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutsTa: Admin tab component for managing workout charts, displaying a searchable grid of workout cards with create/edit functionality via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and shows an alert with the error message and a 'Try Again' button that resets state or reloads the page.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky admin header showing the RawFit Gym logo, name, and tagline alongside a user avatar dropdown menu with profile info and a logout action.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberDas: Member dashboard tab showing membership details, status, QR attendance card, and pause/resume membership controls.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberHea: Sticky header for the member portal displaying the gym logo and a dropdown menu with the member's avatar, name, and logout option.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberMem: Card component that displays a member's current membership status (active, paused, expired) and shows alerts for pending or denied pause requests.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberVid: Member tab that shows assigned workout videos, gating access behind a geolocation check to verify the member is within the gym's radius.
frontend/src/components/member/QRAttenda: Card component that verifies the member's location and uses a QR scanner to record gym check-in/check-out attendance via scanned QR codes.
frontend/src/components/ProductionVersio: Displays an alert banner when the reported app version mismatches the expected production version, offering a hard-refresh button to clear browser cache.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and email to complete their profile, submitting via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemberAuth.ts: Hook that manages gym member authentication state using membership ID login, persisting session to localStorage and syncing across tabs via storage and custom events.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (members, diet/workout charts, attendance, videos, packages, pause requests) using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/src/lib/currencyUtils.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers as Indian Rupees (INR) using Intl.NumberFormat, including per-month and coercion helpers for legacy or mixed-currency data.
frontend/src/lib/locationUtils.ts: Utility functions for geolocation: calculates distance between coordinates using the Haversine formula and verifies whether a user is within an authorized radius of the gym location.
frontend/src/lib/memberAuthLogger.ts: A singleton logging utility for member authentication flows that provides structured, leveled log entries with masked member IDs and unique attempt tracking.
frontend/src/lib/qrCodeUtils.ts: Utility functions for generating, parsing, and validating QR code data for gym attendance, including checksum generation and timestamp validation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a tabbed interface covering Dashboard, Members, Diets, Workouts, Packages, Attendance, Videos, and Pause Requests sections.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page using Internet Identity authentication, with loading, error, and retry states alongside gym branding.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Empty login page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelectionPage.ts: Landing page presenting two login options—Member Login and Admin Login—with navigation cards and gym branding.
frontend/src/pages/MemberDashboard.tsx: Member dashboard page that fetches member data by membership ID and renders a tabbed layout with Dashboard and Video Library tabs.
frontend/src/pages/MemberLoginPage.tsx: React page component for member login that accepts a membership ID, calls the useMemberAuth login hook, and navigates to the member dashboard on success or displays an error alert on failure.
frontend/src/release/expectedProductionV: Defines the expected production version string (v1.3.0.0) and exports utilities to normalize, compare, and get display status for the backend-reported version.
Defines the smoke test checklist items for Version 45 across health, admin, and member categories, plus helper functions to compute per-category and overall completion progress.
frontend/src/release/SmokeTestOverlay.ts: A dialog overlay component for production smoke testing that displays a categorized checklist (health, admin, member flows), auto-checks health items based on backend health data, and tracks overall completion progress.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for RawFit Gym indicating that member login is broken, listing two existing fix-request features covering the login flow, useMemberAuth hook, and diagnostic feedback.
